Interstellar (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $204,479,973Details
International Box Office $438,001,111
Worldwide Box Office $642,481,084
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $15,821,070
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $39,173,879
Total $54,994,949
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Interstellar chronicles the adventures of a group of explorers who make use of a newly discovered wormhole to surpass the limitations on human space travel and conquer the vast distances involved in an interstellar voyage.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$47,510,360 (23.2% of total gross)
Legs:4.30 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$165,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,561 opening theaters/3,561 max. theaters, 7.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $292,184,281

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 5th, 2014 (IMAX) by Paramount Pictures
November 5th, 2014 (Limited) by Paramount Pictures
November 7th, 2014 (Expands Wide) by Paramount Pictures
December 6th, 2024 (IMAX) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: November 5th, 2014 (Wide) (France)
November 5th, 2014 (Wide) (Luxembourg)
November 5th, 2014 (Wide) (Belgium)
November 5th, 2014 (Wide) (Switzerland (French Speaking))
November 6th, 2014 (Wide) (Malaysia)
Video Release: March 17th, 2015 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some intense perilous action and brief strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2342, 10/1/2014)
Running Time: 165 minutes
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Dream Sequence, Nightmare, Non-Chronological, Robot, Time Travel
Social setting: Post Apocalypse, Space Program
Subgenre: Heroic Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Syncopy, Lynda Obst Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Interstellar chronicles the adventures of a group of explorers who make use of a newly discovered wormhole to surpass the limitations on human space travel and conquer the vast distances involved in an interstellar voyage.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$47,510,360 (23.2% of total gross)
Legs:4.30 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$165,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,561 opening theaters/3,561 max. theaters, 7.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $292,184,281

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 5th, 2014 (IMAX) by Paramount Pictures
November 5th, 2014 (Limited) by Paramount Pictures
November 7th, 2014 (Expands Wide) by Paramount Pictures
December 6th, 2024 (IMAX) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: November 5th, 2014 (Wide) (France)

November 5th, 2014 (Wide) (Switzerland (French Speaking))
November 6th, 2014 (Wide) (Malaysia)
Video Release: March 17th, 2015 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some intense perilous action and brief strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2342, 10/1/2014)
Running Time: 165 minutes
Film format: IMAX: DMR

Subgenre: Heroic Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
